description: Generate a 5-room dungeon layout with treasure rooms and boss placement

constraints.label: Boss room is room 5 (the last room)
constraints.name: boss_at_end

constraints.label: Treasure rooms cannot be the boss room
constraints.name: treasure_not_boss_1

constraints.label: Difficulty increases: room difficulty >= room number
constraints.name: difficulty_progression

natural_language_constraints: The dungeon has 5 rooms numbered 1 through 5
The boss must be in the last room (room 5)
There should be exactly 2 treasure rooms, neither of which is the boss room
Room 1 is always the entry point (not a boss or treasure room)
Difficulty should increase as you go deeper - each room is harder than the last
Treasure rooms should reward the player before the boss fight

objective.label: Maximize total dungeon challenge while maintaining progression
objective.name: maximize_challenge
